Pantheon config report

Sources:
- Global config: /tmp/global.jsonc
- Project config: /tmp/project/.pi/oh-my-opencode-pi.jsonc

Presets:
- Active presets: durable
- Available presets: default, durable, fast, research
- Council presets: default

Workflow & UI:
- Extension: enabled
- Dashboard widget: enabled
- Workflow hints: enabled
- Persist todos: enabled
- Auto-continue: disabled
- Max continuations: 5

Background & multiplexer:
- Background tasks: enabled
- Max concurrent: 2
- Reuse sessions: enabled
- Heartbeat interval: 1500ms
- Stale after: 20000ms
- tmux integration: disabled
- Project-scoped window: enabled

Skills & adapters:
- Default skill allow: karpathy-guidelines, cartography
- Default skill deny: (none)
- Cartography: enabled
- Adapter default allow: docs-context7
- Adapter default deny: github-releases
- Disabled adapters: grep-app

Agents:
- fixer
- explorer

Diagnostics:
- [warning] config.mystery (/tmp/demo.jsonc) — Unknown config key; it will be ignored by Pantheon.

Warnings:
- Config parse warning in /tmp/demo.jsonc: 1 JSONC parse issue detected.

Suggested next steps:
- Use /pantheon-adapters to inspect the effective adapter allowlist for the current session.
- Use /pantheon-adapter-health before relying on external research sources.
- Use /pantheon-hooks or /pantheon-doctor when behavior does not match expectations.
